W. S. Offner president of the Walla


Walla Produce company. speaks in
glowing atrms of the Walia Walla
country.


Our country is great vegetable
and fruit country" said Mr.. Offner.
I'VE raise almost anything and are
able to supply the northern markets
earlier than Spokane farmers on ac-
count of the earlier season. This year
was very good year for us except
that the coddlmg moth is fast spread
ing and running many apples The
moth is now found generally in and
around Walla Walla. the Palouse coun-
try and is even becoming very notice
able in the Spokane country. This
pest has forced many to abandon their
orchards and turn to wheat. alfalfa and
vegetables. This year our company
shipped out over 300 cars Of fruit and
vegetables. besides consuming about the
same amount in the local trade. We
have had no trouble in marketing our
goods and this year disposed of every
